layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per COLUMN, category rows down the left (EIF; SP,DC,JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K). Black-filled cells mark the selected bucket. Transaction row is solid black across all five asset columns. EIF row is black-filled for the 'CPI Asia Onshore - Class B' and 'York Credit Opportunities Fund LP' columns. Footer/group label bottom-left: 'MS MR Trust Partnership'. Single Amount of Income block on this page.

uncertainties.note: entire Transaction row is a solid black band across all five columns; treated as no transaction code
sans-serif glyphs ambiguous between capital I and lowercase l; tesseract read 'AlI51DPV'
'Other Type of Income' cell is black-filled with no legible write-in text
single black band on Value row A spans both the York Credit Opportunities Fund LP and Tesla Inc. columns (verified in hi-res crop); both assets also share a single band on Amount row H
